title: String to Integer (atoi)
coreIdea: Convert a string to a 32-bit signed integer following specific rules (skip leading whitespace, optional sign, digits until a non-digit, clamp to INT_MIN/INT_MAX on overflow), testing careful edge-case handling rather than any algorithmic complexity.
recognitionCues: asks to implement a standard library function (atoi) from scratch
tests edge case handling more than algorithmic thinking â€” overflow, invalid input, whitespace, sign
approach: Skip leading whitespace. Check for optional '+' or '-' sign. Parse consecutive digits, building the number, checking after each digit if the accumulated value would overflow 32-bit int range (clamp and return early if so). Stop at the first non-digit character. Return 0 if no valid number was found.
